title: The Noland Legend Returns
description: The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Nami. The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Is its cry really that strange?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Yes, it's just as Noland's log said.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The log-pose won't be of any use!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: That's where this bird comes in!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Why'd you tell us so late!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Stop whinin'! There's no time for that!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: You better have caught one South Bird,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: By the time the sun rises...!

dialogue.speaker: South Bird
dialogue.text: Ughh... I think I ate too much...

summary: The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.
